privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for calligra_words_env archaeological_site_report_formatting task. Confirmed that the initial site report, images, and instructions are fully synthetically generated and explicitly set up via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected formatting guidelines (h1/h2 headings), specific radiocarbon data keywords (e.g. "1250", "beta-12345"), scientific taxa requiring italics ("Zea mays", etc.), and document path precisely match the prompt description. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
